reviews.title: Disappointing stay
reviews.text:
We were looking so forward to staying here, but time & again, we were disappointed. From check-in to check-out, staff was ill-equipped to handle feedback (even though they asked "how was your stay?" & just gave a blank look when we said "it could have been better" & did not ask for further details).

The only redeeming point was the fantastic breakfast buffet spread & friendly staff at the cafe, but most of them were only very focused & friendly to non-Asians. Location-wise it was within walking distance to town centre & beach. Yes we walked because the "complimentary shuttle" was under servicing, but we were not informed of it during check-in. Even when we asked about it on the day itself, they just kept saying might be available later.

Room was too small for the big beds, toilet was very spacious though, but not like we will put our luggage in there, or sleep in there. There was no space to put 2 29-inch luggage for packing, and the big-screen tv was too near to the bed for comfort.

Being a beach-side hotel & having the selling point of a fantastic pool, we would expect the room to have sufficient hanging/drying racks/clothes string in the toilet/balcony. However, the ONE & ONLY thing they had was a "DRYING RACK" that was actually ONE grab bar on the balcony. Even though there was a signage to remind people not to hang things on the balcony railing, every room we saw was doing that, and seriously, it wasn't hard to guess why.

reviews.title: Not a family hotel
reviews.text:
Had paid for two rooms but only one was ready at check in time. None of the rooms had kettle to heat water for the tea or coffee provided. Service in the restaurants was very unreliable. Firstly it was very slow or the ordered items did not come at all.  There was couple of starts in the staff who came to rescue ( Arini at Xmas eve buffet and Aaro at the pool area).

The hotel generally is not very child oriented. There is not separate children's pool and during Xmas day the pool was full of adults drinking alcohol. Also the Christmas program was very adult oriented. The kids club is quite small and only free for 2 hours daily. The staff was friendly there though.

The rooms were facing parking lot where some building work was done during the day.  The couch on the balcony would have been pleasant to relax and the the breeze from the sea was also pleasant. 

Be aware that december/ January is trash season in Bali and the Seminyak beach has a lot of trash. Also the "beach boulevard" starting near the hotel is full of motorcycles ( unlike Sanur f.ex.).

reviews.title: Not good hotel
reviews.text:
We came to check in at 5:00 Pm afternoon and the room was not ready. They told us that they finished cleaning it but the room service is counting the items !! They asked us to wait without apologising or offering any compensating facility. We have been on travel and expect to have our room at five when the check in is at 3:00. After half an hour of waiting we asked them about the room, they replied with the same unsatisfactory reply. We had to wait more than 40 mins to have our room. 
The room is not well maintained, the sheets and the towels are not really clean. U can see stains on it. Pay a small additional amount and stay in another hotel

reviews.title: Disappointed stay
reviews.negatives:
My recent stay at Marriott Bali was unfortunately a big disappointment.

I booked this stay specifically for relaxation and peace, looking forward to unwinding after a long journey. I checked in at 1:00 AM, expecting to finally rest. However, starting from 7:00 AM, vacuum machines were running and construction work continued throughout my stay inside the property.

The constant noise was extremely disturbing and made it impossible to relax or enjoy the environment. For a hotel of this reputation and standard, I did not expect such a lack of consideration for guests’ comfort especially so early in the morning after a late-night check-in.

This was far from the relaxing experience I had planned, and it significantly affected the quality of my stay. I sincerely hope management takes guest comfort more seriously moving forward.

reviews.text:

If trying to return from the beach with kids all wet and sandy is bad, getting ripped off by taxi touts trying to take advantage of your plight makes you wonder why you chose this location. It's also a little strange the hotel tolerates the 'monopolies' preventing private hire cars to pick up just outside the premises.

reviews.title: Overpriced at New Years Time
reviews.text: I have read a lot of reviews on this hotel, and I feel after staying there the majority must have been based around price/ value for money. We stayed for 4 nights over the new year period where of course we paid a premium rate. Unfortunately we were disappointed. Our room over looked a really noisy, high traffic side street. I wouldnt recommend for those wishing to relax or with young babies. The rooms were clean and new, and probably a small - medium size. It was located down the Legian end of Seminyak and really far down a side street. Though walking distance to the beach it was unusable at this time of year due to the weather and all of the rubbish that washes up onto the sand overnight. We were disrupted a number of times by phone calls to our room from people trying to let us know we had 'won' accommodation in other hotels. A bit concernig as they knew our names - so the hotel must have passed on our details. The staff were friendly, though service was terribly slow (both room service and by the pool). The breakfast had a vast offering and was nice, though we were very disappointed by the food we ordered at the restaurant and by the pool at other times of the day. I think its a bit of a stretch for the hotel to rate itself 5 star. We have moved onto the W in Seminyak, which is (though much more pricey) worlds apart from the Mariott. If you booked a package deal and got this accommodation at a cheaper rate I am sure you would be satisfied as the rooms are clean and the staff are friendly. Overall an ok place to base yourself if you plan on being out and about a lot and not looking for that resort kind of experience.

Three pools and the children were allowed to swim even in the pool bar. Management need to consider all paying guests we wanted to swim and relax by the pool which was impossible. Even at night several couples along with ourselves phoned to have the 9pm pool curfew enforced. We will never be back. Certainly not 5 star hotel at all, average breakfast and our shower didn't dran away so got smelly through the day. If you are looking for a relaxing break I can't tell you strongly enough. reviews.title: Vacation
reviews.text:
When I booked Courtyard by Marriott for my Seminyak vacation, I’ve had some expectations. We checked in at 2:30pm-ish, a bit earlier than their check in time 3pm. Our room was ready which I really appreciated because it’s an hour drive from our Ubud resort. Upon check in, the front office staff was hospitable but she didn’t utter anything about their fire drill practice. After 30mins into our room, we heard a fire alarm. I got panicked and rushed down via stairs with some other guests. Apparently there was no notice from the hotel to the guests about the fire drill practice. BAD and VERY UNPROFESSIONAL for such a big reputable hotel. We met an assistant manager of front office at the lobby lift area and she was asking us where we were heading. Her actions at that time were as if we were the wrong ones to come all the way down from our rooms. Unbelievable, and I find it quite funny. She should be assuring the guests about the fire alarm not being real but not asking where we’re going. Anyways, overall interactions with all the staffs were great, friendly and helpful start from the security gate till the housekeeping. 

The room looks obviously worn down with lots of stains and scratches. Not to mention that the electricity was out for our room. The staffs were very  helpful and fast in fixing it tho.


The chefs at the buffet breakfast stations were insincere in our opinion. The cook to order eggs were not how we asked them to be for 2 consecutive days. The staffs were just focusing on their tasks, not on the customers too.

Location was nice, 5 to 10 mins walk to the beach. There was a sunbathing spot at the beach for Marriott guests. 


Would not visit again.
Would not recommend to friends.

reviews.title: Clean and good location but very overpriced !!
reviews.text: Thought we would spoil ourselves and book in to a 5 star resort after 20+ visits to Bali and staying at 3 star accommodation. Found the value for money is very disappointing.  We paid an additional few hundred AUD to be upgraded to the King Deluxe Pool View room and found the room to be smaller then a standard double room.  The bathroom was within 5 feet of the bed and not allowing for any privacy.  Very basic room service menu and overpriced for the small portions received.  Pool bar is overpriced and paying the same as what we do in the North West of Western Australia (mining town prices!!)  All up we paid over $2,000 for 7 days & expected 5 star .. this would be a 3 star max! Will be looking at hotels that aren't owned by a major hotel chain as think there is where it is let down.  Staff are beautiful and friendly but aren't all Balinese?

reviews.title: Pleasant, Comfortable, Worth a Return

The breakfast buffet was wonderful, though it would have been nicer to have a larger selection of healthy food; though having said that the selection on offer was wonderful. Getting to your room was a bit of a labyrinth, but fine. The room was clean and gorgeously cold and airconditioned. The pool was wonderful.

reviews.text: I stupidly booked for the wrong date and didn't realise until I arrived at the hotel. The hotel wouldn't shift my booking so I cancelled the booking and paid again. The Agoda listing was misleading- king bed AND twin beds actually meant king OR twin beds. So we had to get cot beds brought in which were horribly uncomfortable. Later I contacted Agoda for a refund on the wrong booking. They were happy to refund if the hotel were to confirm that the booking was cancelled. Marriott refused to confirm even though I spoke to no fewer that three staff members. I would expect a lot more from an international chain like Marriott.

Who hid the storage?
reviews.text:
There was NO storage in our room! A minute amount of hanging space...enough for one person, and NO drawers! I like to unpack when I go away so that I can relax. But we had to work out of our suitcases all the time, then try to find a place to PUT those suitcases! 
Also, there was just 1 hook in the bathroom. The hotel would like people to "go green" by not expecting fresh towels every day, but there was NOWHERE to hang them to dry! Also there was no towel rail in the sitting area outside our pool access room to dry swimsuits. 
We were on the ground floor, and several times over our 2 night stay, we were overwhelmed by the stink of sewage on the approach to our room. 
Given all of the above, I fail to see how this hotel can claim to be a 5 star establishment.

reviews.title: Lovely staff, but property needs an upkeep
reviews.text:
1. Location - just a five minute walk to Seminyak beach. A greek restaurant is just right across it if you need some good food during the day.
2. Reception - all smiles and very accommodating. They gave us welcome drinks and cold towels while waiting. 
3. Room - I initially booked a room with balcony (city view) but upon check-in, I was told that there were no rooms available with a balcony. Since it was already fully paid, I insisted on having them a room with a balcony. It wasn’t long until the receptionist messaged me that they found me a room and gave me an upgrade facing the garden and a partial view of the pool. Room was nice, but one thing we didn’t like upon check-in was that the couches/seats inside the room were a bit moist (probably the previous guests sat their wet after pool time), so it was bit icky. There was also a musty smell whenever we enter the room. Nonetheless, the smell will fade when we turn on the AC, which was also at good temps we can easily control. The T&B was a nice touch, having the shower and toilet in separate areas.
4. Value for money - it’s a 7 out of 10 for me, as the property definitely showed its age. Well maintained but could use some much needed upkeep. One of the offerings that I did like was the free shuttle drop-offs at certain spots, which was a huge convenience.
5. Communication - the staff are always quick to respond, and housekeeping is always happy to deliver our supply of bottled water. I accidentally broke a bottle and one of the staff came in all smiles, ready to clean up my mess! 
6. Facilities - we availed their massage services and wasn’t satisfied. It was quite pricey, and wasn’t value for money.
7. Breakfast - this was buffet style and was included in our room availment. It was alright, nothing exceptional. There were a lot of food options, but nothing exceptional. Coffee from their machine tasted a bit diluted, so manage your expectations.

The noise was also quite unbearable at night, but as we were told when we asked after two nights - all family rooms face the same street so there is no chance of getting a quieter option.
The pool was also really disappointing. Over 5 days we never managed to get a sun bed in the sun - despite a 30 minute hold policy we noticed those guests whose room opened directly to the pool grabbed the sun ones early in the morning and then regularly left to go back to their room. Location is great though and facilities such as the buggy was also fabulous.

reviews.title: 2 nights in Seminyak
reviews.text:
It is a nice and modern hotel. At over S$200 a night, it is not cheap but that's the price of accommodations in Seminyak. 

Some things to note:-

1. Pillow choices:- they don't have pillow choices, which is quite rare for a hotel of this price.
2. Noise:- we initially had the room facing the streets. There is absolutely no sound proofing, so you can hear every car honk and taxi. We upgraded to the pool room for around S$17 per night.
3. Breakfast:- this is quite good, small but tight selection. Coffee is unfortunately pretty shit.

The hotel is mostly Australian/foreign tourist. The pool gets very crowded and is too small for the amount of guests - so don't think about getting a sun bed if that's what you are looking for. There is water aerobic classes which seems fun, and the pool bar isn't too expensive.

As a non smoker I found cigarette smoke a problem, there is no smoking in public areas but the private areas are so close that you couldn't avoid it. Bath towels also smelt strongly of cigarett smoke at times. Massage/Spa- my family used and were very disappointed.( they had vouchers for massages) Much better outside the resort. One restaurant, breakfast was lovely with great selection, we had dinner there on the first night and quiet nice. Just a 5 min walk to the beach, we didn't use the beach club but great little golf carts to take you too and from at the hotel. 
I won't stay there again, I felt the rooms are just too small for me for the price and I could be staying in a resort anywhere in a city.

reviews.title: Marriott Seminyak over NYE
reviews.text:
The hotel is nice but definitely not a 5* hotel. There were no big issues with the hotel itself or the staff, just a couple of minor ones. For instance - the strip of mould in the shower and the food & beverage options were definitely not 5* worthy (not such a big issue given the proximity to Eat Street). 

The biggest issue we had staying here wasn't a reflection on the staff or the hotel but the clientele it draws over NYE. Expect a lot of brash, vulgar behaviour from the hotel guests if you are staying here over NYE and joining in the festivities. It seems to draw a very rowdy crowd, which is fine if that's what you're into. It would have also been nice to have been made aware that the NYE countdown party would continue til 2am, our room faced the party location directly and we were flying out New Year's day which wasn't ideal. Wouldn't stay here again over this period.

reviews.title: Good Hotel - If you like Seminyak
reviews.text:
Went here based on reviews and hadn't stayed at this hotel before - had stayed Courtyard in Nusa Dua and liked that experience.

Pros

New, modern, staff are well trained and attentive (especially at breakfast). Swimming pool is good, though could do with more chairs & shade. Security is taken seriously (coming and going). Breakfast provides a good range of food and coffees. Air con, TV etc is excellent.

Cons

Not a beachfront hotel (5-10min walk), room cleaning was a bit hit & miss on a few days, the hotel is shaped in a courtyard (literally) and at the centre is the swimming pool (some may see this as a "Pro" but I have as a "con" because you get the pool noise - call me old). One evening we had a downpour of rain and decided to order room service and stay in - it took near 50 minutes and the standard was in contrast to breakfast: the burger meat looked like a processed piece of cardboard with similar taste (yes, I have bitten cardboard to compare) and the potato wedges comprised 10 (maybe this came from the kids menu?). So, that was a bit surprising and very unlike Marriott.

Overall, it's a good hotel at a good price (we paid about 90 GBP), though it is more that we didn't like Seminyak and the local streets or alleys. Would highly recommend to those who like Seminyak area.  

Security tip for hotel manager: Do not ask guests to write their names and room numbers on a list - which other guests can read and remember as they add their details to the list - when using your facilities like the gym. Just think about that for a second.

reviews.text: We had a very relaxing stay at the hotel even though this was for an Indian wedding which can be quite hectic. I especially enjoyed the area....you could walk out of the hotel and be at some quaint streets which had restaurants, shops and massage parlours. It is also quite a short distance to some of the most vibrant nightlife. I would recommend this as a hotel to get a mix of all of the things Bali has to offer.

reviews.title: pleasant stay at Marriott
reviews.text:
It was a pleasant stay. The hotel is new and modern which is my preference.
I was very disappointed to be located near the kids-zone, which lead to being woke up 3x mornings in a row!
Raised issue with hotel, and it was ignored. Apart from that, I always enjoy staying at the Marriott around the world. The room size I felt was very small compared to usual Marriott standards however that is quite normal. I would stay again, assuming I'm not surrounded by man screaming kids running up and down the hallways at 8am!
reviews.positives: new hotel, good location, comfortable bed

reviews.title: Outstanding new hotel
reviews.text: Stayed for 5 nights at the junior suite on a 1st fl with a young child was a perfect choice. We could hear the music at night but didn't bother us at all. My 4 yr old daughter enjoyed the pool so much. Restaurant food could use some improvement though, however the service is fantastic. Staffs were excellent in every way.  Over all we will definitely come back and recommend to friends.
reviews.positives: Pool, close to the beach, staff performance.

reviews.title: Comfortable
reviews.text: satisfied however the pillow and beddings should be upgraded like other marriot hotels offer.

reviews.title: Courtyard by Marriott Bali Seminyak Review
reviews.text:
Very good & relaxing. Most points were very good. One small issue, the room we had faced the road at the rear of reception side of the hotel. Although the room was very clean and had all amenities in very good condition, the room was noisy most of the day & evening with traffic I people noise from the street & road below. 

If you are thinking about Seminyak Bali then I would recommend you stay in this hotel, however I would also recommend that you be careful to book a pool-side room and not a street facing room.

reviews.title: my take on courtyard marriot
reviews.text: Overall it was excellent. Would have rated them 5 star if not for the malfunction of the AC in our room. Turns out whole block affected. Management was slow to react to the crisis n only changed our room after 3 times we approach them. Some got their room changed that very wee hours when it happened. We got ours the next day evening.
reviews.positives: excellent staff hospitality, location and great in house menu

reviews.title: 3 days were too short
reviews.text: The staff are very attentive, well trained and polite. The first night when we checked in, as we were indecisive about the rooms, the reception brought us around and showed us to 3 different  rooms.  Eventually he gave us a good deal for the upgrade. Breakfast  was great  and the ice cream was a big hit to the kids. The cream puff and mango smoothie that was offered by staff who walked around the dining area was fantastic. .Thanks  for the buggy that drove us to the beach! Esp with kids who complaint about walking too much. Great to have a kids club where I can drop  my son for a few hours while I go for a massage.
reviews.positives: Professional and attentive  staff. Clean and New rooms.

reviews.title: great hotel; except stink pillow

reviews.title: deluxe room is too noisy
reviews.text:
I could stay our stay was good. hotel staff are all very approachable and helpful. my husband had a food poisoning from dinner at seminyak area, so we called the in house doctor. service was prompt and he did get better after took the medication. thanks god. during check out, they helped us called a taxi to send us to the airport. they did provide airport transfer but it's chargeable and more expensive than taxi fare. 
down part is we choose the normal deluxe room instead of pool view, and turns out it was so noisy as we can hear motorcycle an scars passing by. next time I would definitely choose the pool side room. overall me and my husband both loves the hotel. would definitely come back again.

reviews.title: Great stay, location good for beach and shopping
reviews.text: We loved our 6 day stay at the Courtyard by Marriott Bali Seminyak.  Staff all went out of their way to please.  The pool view rooms are fabulous and the layout of the hotel works well.   The bed was so comfortable, air conditioning worked well and the room very inviting.   Perhaps could have more pool sun lounges as people secure their sun lounge early.  Security is very full on which I appreciate however, my only negative complaint is about the sniffer/security dogs (Golden Retrievers) which seemed to be panting in the heat and looked quite tired at times.
reviews.positives: Fantastic pool, enjoyable entertainment in the evening, Seminyak Kitchen/great breakfast, coffee and meals

The staff were very helpful and friendly, the room was a good size

reviews.title: Beautiful property to spoil yourself with
reviews.text: We stayed for just one night in between bookings at the hotel across the street but wish we could’ve stayed longer. It’s definitely one of the pricier hotels in the Seminyak area but it’s worth it if you want guaranteed comfort, cleanliness and a genuinely attentive staff. Service in Bali is hit or miss but we dined at the restaurant and had the BEST dinner experience. Our room was spacious, perfectly designed, and had a beautiful bathroom and comfortable bed. The pool was completely in the shade so not a good place for sunbathing but luckily the beach is a short walk away. There was also quite a bit of noise from kids at the pool early in the morning, so beware if your room is near the kiddie end of the pool. Even though our stay was short, I know enough to highly recommend it and come back when we return to Bali.

reviews.title: A great experience!
reviews.text: I and my fiancé booked this hotel for one night only.   The hotel upgraded us to pool side view. The room was nice.  We enjoyed the pool a lot.  We have extend our stay for one day due to active volcano causing our flight delayed.  The staff from the private beach is very helpful.  I confirm the extension via his mobile phone.  They let us keep our room.  We enjoyed a lot there.  However, we could not enjoy the spa there because of the full booking.

reviews.title: Great location with friendly staff
reviews.text:
Great location near seminyak beach and shopping area like market or local
Boutique. The staff are friendly and helpful, all room have pool side view so it’s nice when you seat at balcony. We had order dinner twice in room and all the food are delicious, also the food buffet breakfast are great especially the bagel and egg benedict. The con maybe about transportation to the beach, we need to waited for 15-30 minutes, you could always walk but for family with young children that would be too far and the seated are limited at beach area.

reviews.title: *sighs*
reviews.text: We have stayed at a total of 3 different places while we have been in Bali, courtyard was our last place. After having stayed at two magnificent places and having our driver tell us how great courtyard was we were both very excited that we had a great run with hotels. Our first disappointment was the price quoted on Agoda was not the price we paid upon arrival. Within this price for 3 nights, breakfast was not included which I also thought was an utter disappointment considering I had paid quite a lot to stay here. The first hotel we stayed at was 4 nights, $350 ish dollars - beautiful quality hotel with breakfast included. It just goes so show. The hotel itself was beautiful, the staff were so very kind and friendly but the next time I stay in Seminyak I will not be spending my money at courtyard. So sad our holiday didn’t end on the high note that we had hoped. But I still thank courtyard for the beautiful hotel. It’s not often I am driven to say negative things. Thanks Bali ❣️❣️
reviews.room_type: Deluxe King With Balcony, Guest room, 1 King, City view, Balcony

reviews.title: Good experience for first time in Bali!
reviews.text:
The breakfast served was exceptional. Many varieties of food were offered.
Many shops, cafes, massage shops easily available near the hotel.
Security for the hotel was very tight.
The pool area, gym, other facilities are good.
The staff were very polite.
The only setback was that the other guests were always slamming the doors especially early in the morning preventing us from sleeping in.

reviews.title: Amazing breakfast buffet
reviews.text:
The awesome: 
1. Breakfast buffet
2. Courteous staff, especially staff at Seminyak Kitchen (a Caucasian staff ensured that i was given a table first, instead of attending to another guest who barged into the restaurant).
3. Had dinner three times at Seminyak Kitchen, twice at the restaurant and once via room service. The food was good. Staff who took my room service order was very courteous and pleasant.
4. Swimming pool complemented by the water-resistant beanbags for relaxation
5. Clean washrooms at common areas. 
6. Popcorn station available at lobby and during one rainy day, there was a station that provided hot chocolate drink (though the chocolate taste was rather bland)
7. Kids club free for first 2 hours, however, the schedule activity for clay making was cancelled without notice. Kid was disappointed.


Not-so-pleasant: 
1. Stayed for 4 nights and the bedding smelled musky from 3rd night, not sure if bedding was changed as requested. 
2. Balcony facing the pool was unfortunately noisy due to echos from inconsiderate guests using the pool.
3. Had to endure with stomping noises from the room above on 6th floor

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Strategic location. Good Hotel to stay for us

reviews.title: Excellent choice
reviews.text: Booked this hotel because of the many positive reviews and I have to say, it's really pretty decent. It's about a 15-20 minute car ride from the airport, the rooms are well maintained and clean, the hotel staff are friendly and helpful, the daily buffet breakfast was really good, and it was overall a very pleasant experience. For the price we paid, couldn't ask for more. Highly recommended. Thank you!

reviews.title: Excellent retreat
reviews.text:
Pros
-Friendly and very accomodating staff
-Child friendly hotel with reliable child care/babysitting services and kids play club facilities
-Excellent spa
-Well planned activities by hotel for guests
-Vibrant pool side bar
-Clean and cosy rooms

Cons
-rooms facing the street/pool are exposed to traffic noise /pool music (not so much at night when traffic slows down and pool is closed (very much a day problem)
- pool side music is loud enough to be appreciated in the spa which takes away the relaxing atmosphere of the spa itself (the massages are good though). Noise is more pronounced more so after 5 pm when there is a live band - spa staff will inform you regarding the noise prior to the booking though - suggest to sound proof the spa as paying customers to the spa deserve the whole experience of a spa not just the massage itself

Summary 
An excellent and lively place to stay especially for families with kids 
Great team working there!

reviews.title: great location, walking distance to beach, good pool
reviews.text:
Great location, next to beach, hotel also has a small shack right at the beach as well.

reviews.title: Comfortable stay
reviews.text: The hotel is well located, close to the shops, restaurants and beach. There is a shuttle that takes you to a private area on the Seminyak beach which has sun beds and towels for guests. The only issue that we had were our pillows, they smelt used, however once we mentioned it to the staff they were replaced immediately. reviews.title: Good location, decent modern compact room
reviews.text:
First impression looks like a mass-scale hotel for large tour groups from hell. It was certainly the case on my first day as some sort of multi-level marketing organisation organised their annual trip to reward their high achievers or something like that. They had dinner events with loud music at the pool on my first night. It wasn’t easy to sleep.

The room was decent size, enough to put two medium bags for two adult travellers. Aircond works superbly fine but the shower system wasn’t good - may be it was just low water pressure or the system brand wasn’t Grohe. There was also no large mirror by the sink but there is a small mirror on the side. The bed was decent and better than the other hotel I stayed earlier. 

Breakfast selection was very good and they had one of the best bagels I had for some time. I had the bagel everyday sometimes with poached egg. As a Muslim, I dislike having the pork dishes served side by side with the rest but I guess Bali is like another country when it comes to religion in Indonesia. 

The hotel is just a few minutes walk to the Double Six beach which is a popular hangout. The hotel has a regular shuttle service to the beach. I rented a motorbike from a roadside shop right across to the hotel on Drupadi road. Don’t pay more than 50k rupiah per day if u staying more than 3 days. I even used the bike to go to Ubud for a day and it wasn’t all that bad.

The pool was a good size but a hotel of this size probably need a larger space on the poolside. Everyday I could not get any sunbath-bed by the poolside so ended up going to the beach instead. It wasn’t a peak season so I guess it will be harder to get a good pool side spot during peak times.

Overall it was a good hotel to stay. I probably won’t stay here again so soon but if i want a nice cosy and compact hotel with good food and short distance to the beach, I would come here.

reviews.text:
My partner and I and our couple friends stayed here for 5 nights. The staff are incredible - can’t fault the customer service at all.
The rooms are nice, clean, with good views of the pool area and comfy beds (no smart TV, only cable).
The pool area is designed slightly weird - the top section at the bar is a higher level than the rest. There’s not enough room on the edge of the pool for lounges so there are bean bags, but still not enough room to easily walk around them. 
The lower level of the pool has heaps of lounges but you need to get in early to secure one on the sunny side. Since the pool is in the middle of the resort (hence, courtyard) only one side gets sun. The pool was a little cold, and at midday they do water aerobics which is a fun idea but the music is loud (about 30 minutes). No biggie but just not quite as relaxing as it could be.
Overall very happy with our stay here.

reviews.title: Enjoyed our stay
reviews.text: Hotel is in a good location, walking distance to main shopping/restaurant strips (however it can get very hot if you decide to walk). Hotel concierge provides free shuttle to places closeby, you just need to ask the staff and see if they can take you there. Otherwise the concierge also provides a transportation service and there are a lot of taxis driving around. Our room was medium sized, towels and sheets a little damp (not dried properly), otherwise clean. Buffet breakfast is great in comparison to other hotels we stayed at during our stay, staff is very attentive with most people able to speak English very well.

reviews.title: Lovely
reviews.text: Loved my stay here. I will return in the future. The buffet breakfast is delicious. The staff are very friendly,  and accomodating. Great value for money! Loved it.

reviews.title: Fantastic service with regards to the ash cloud
reviews.text:
Our stay here was extended due to the ash cloud and the Marriott staff were so understanding and helpful. They didn't jump up their prices like other hotels did, let us book day by day with each day we were delayed by the ash cloud and were really helpful with assisting us in rearranging everything. 

The hotel is very comfortable too, awesome breakfast buffet and the pool here is simply amazing!!

reviews.title: Please stay
reviews.positives: Location is great and the breakfast buffet is fantastic. I would recommend anyone to stay for a quality time in Seminyak.

reviews.title: Great resort
reviews.text: We stayed our first 2 nights here out of 8 and decided to move to be closer to all the restaurants we like. It made all the other places we stayed at in same price range substandard

reviews.title: Enjoyable (when it's not so full)
reviews.text: It was a bit tense due to the security checks - eg checking for bombs with mirrors and dogs, once inside it is a beautiful space, very new, very clean, great restaurant and service. Amazing staff and customer service, good energy and confidence. The pool are and chairs gets overcrowded, and considering the beach is not top notch - this is annoying.  Some of the guest can be a bit out of place making the experience a bit negative - but you should expect this if booking here.
reviews.positives: Staff vibe, room view (front rooms), comfortable

reviews.title: Good Experience
reviews.text: Nice! But compromise by location.

reviews.title: Amazing stay
reviews.text: The staff at The Marriott Seminyak were amazing, greeted you whenever you walked passed and made sure you were comfortable at every chance. The food by the pool was amazing, a bit more expensive then say the restaurants along the beach and up the road but definitely worth it. Buffet breakfast was amazing aswell. The room was lovely bed was a bit firm. The cleaners cleaned the room wonderfully daily. The location was really good close to markets, shops, restaurants and the beach and the blue bird cabs just out the front. You also feel very safe at the hotel 24/7 security.

reviews.title: Up to what we expect to get, no suprirse

reviews.title: Pleasant Stay
reviews.text: We stayed 4 nights in mid December in a suite room.  Location is very good and yet quiet..hotel is new and with very friendly and helpful staff overall...you feel like an honour guest.  Breakfast is good with many variety, we had dinner once in the restaurant and food was nice and price is reasonable for hotel . Will come back....well done Marriott Courtyard!

reviews.title: Brand New Hotel Run by an Experienced Team
reviews.text: I absolutely loved this hotel and from the minute you walk in you will be taken away with a breathtaking feel that you are in a very luxury holiday resort. The hotel staff were very friendly and although the hotel was very new and only just 2-3 months old - it was obvious that the management and team working there were very experienced in their roles and knew how to take care of every one of our wishes or concerns. Nothing is ever 100% perfect but I can say that the hotel reacted very fast to correct any wrongs and ensure everything met our full expectations. Besides the spacious, modern and beautiful rooms - we did look forward every morning to what I think is the BEST buffet breakfast which I ever had. This hotel is located 5 minutes walk from the beach and is on the hippest and most happening street in Seminyak with plenty our surrounding choices of restaurants and spa - what more could one ask for!
reviews.positives: Super Modern, Sparkling Clean, Fun and & Convenient
